original_prompt: 给这个一套首饰做一张亚马逊主图，要求四宫格排版，展示这套首饰的穿戴方式，戴皇冠——戴耳环——戴项链，和一个穿戴好的模特。
optimized_prompt:
[Visual Description]
A professional Amazon product listing image featuring a structured 2x2 grid layout (four quadrants) against a clean white or light gray background. 
- Top-Left Quadrant: Close-up shot of a model wearing the silver Baroque-inspired tiara. Focus on the 5-peak silhouette and the central pear-cut crystal catching the light. Hair is styled in an elegant updo.
- Top-Right Quadrant: Macro shot of a model's ear wearing the chandelier earrings. Highlight the geometric diamond-to-teardrop outline and the pave clusters.
- Bottom-Left Quadrant: Close-up of the model's neckline wearing the V-drop necklace. Emphasize the articulated chain and the sharp V-formation with the bottom teardrop crystal.
- Bottom-Right Quadrant: A portrait of the beautiful bridal model wearing the complete three-piece set (tiara, earrings, necklace) together, smiling confidently. She wears a white wedding dress.

[Subject Lock]
The jewelry must match the provided visual fingerprint: High-polish silver-tone metal, Baroque filigree scrollwork, openwork design, and prominent pear-cut clear crystals surrounded by round brilliant-cut stones.

[Text & UI Layout]
- Main Title: "Complete Bridal Set"
- Sub Title: "Tiara, Necklace & Earrings"
- Text Style: Minimalist sans-serif font, dark grey or black, placed unobtrusively in the center or corner of the layout to guide the viewer.
layout_logic:
Since this is a 4-grid layout intended for Amazon, clarity is key. 
1. **Grid Separation**: Use thin, subtle white or light grey lines to separate the four quadrants to keep it looking organized, not cluttered.
2. **Text Placement**: Place the text in the center intersection of the grid (if using a cross overlay) or overlay it gently at the bottom of the image. For Amazon, keep text minimal. 
3. **Focus**: Ensure the 'Full Set' image (Bottom-Right) is slightly more prominent or has the best lighting to serve as the emotional anchor of the image.
